Pet project

Hanbin
Drama Tracker

A personal web app for tracking Asian dramas — built from scratch as a side project. Full-featured tracker with watchlist management, episode progress, ratings, genre filters, and a quote widget. Designed and developed end-to-end: UI/UX in Figma, frontend implementation, and product decisions.

Personal project UI/UX Design Product thinking Web app

What I built

  • · Watchlist with status tracking (watching, completed, dropped)
  • · Genre & country filters, search
  • · Episode progress & season tracking
  • · Rating system & personal tags
  • · Auto-fill drama metadata on add
  • · Daily quote from watched dramas
